channel.title: GLSL on Pedro Gomes
channel.description: Recent content in GLSL on Pedro Gomes

item.title: Vulkan & OpenGL Memory Benchmark
item.author: pedro.gomes.prog@gmail.com (pedromgomes.github.com)
item.description: Project aimed to learn both Vulkan, a fairly recent cross-platform 3D graphics and computing API, and OpenGL, another 3D graphics API that exists for much longer. This was the final project before attaining my graduate degree in Computer Science. It is about memory, an analysis on how both APIs abstract memory and memory usage with a simple performance test. Graphics APIs are often mentioned when discussing performance in video games. Vulkan, OpenGL, and DirectX are famous C/C++ APIs used to manage GPU resources.
